case_title: GARY G. BEYROUTI VS. LANDSCAPE OFFICE, LTD

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-21-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LANDSCAPE OFFICE, LTD (JENNIFER BROOKE-PARTNER)
PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFT JENNIFER BROOKE BY PERSONAL SERVICE ON MARCH 21, 2008.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEYROUTI, GARY G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANDSCAPE OFFICE, LTD (JENNIFER BROOKE-PARTNER) $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, JENNIFER BROOKE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BEYROUTI, GARY G. AS TO DEFENDANT LANDSCAPE OFFICE, LTD (JENNIFER BROOKE-PARTNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LANDSCAPE OFFICE, LTD (JENNIFER BROOKE-PARTNER)
